module.name: src
module.purpose: Rust workspace source root for Marix crates with a flat Cargo crate layout plus prompt-template sources. It organizes agent, client, common, prompt, host, protocol, and tool crates/modules; protocol now owns a dedicated plan module exporting Plan and PlanSignature, step intent kinds are unit variants whose wording lives in StepDraft.description, Plan prompt wording names the protocol Plan directly, prompt templates emit "Intent" unit strings, and agent task runtime records parsed Plan values with generated StepSignature lists in TaskState::plan_list.

childModules.name: agent
childModules.purpose: Agent crate namespace for model/session/task/prompt/step orchestration; task runtime parses Plan output, stores plan_list entries, rejects unit Intent steps before insertion, tracks step_count, and imports the top-level step::Step runtime type.

childModules.name: client
childModules.purpose: Client crate namespace for the marix_client library, ClientSession and signature-aware ClientEvent source, and client binaries including a CLI whose oneshot mode exits on Done completion events.

childModules.name: common
childModules.purpose: Shared common crate namespace for config loading with serializable System/Platform/Arch re-exports, external adapters, logging, and structure utilities including WorkQueue::clear for session cleanup.

childModules.name: prompt
childModules.purpose: Owns prompt templates used by model-facing steps, including Plan prompt wording that names the protocol Plan directly and unit-string Intent examples whose pending text belongs in StepDraft.description.

childModules.name: protocol
childModules.purpose: First-class marix-protocol workspace crate for reusable session, task, plan, step, execution, tool, and shared Signature trait definitions; Plan includes serde_json parsing for completed model-step output, PlanSignature implements Signature, and StepKind::Intent has no string payload.

childModules.name: host
childModules.purpose: Host crate namespace for HostSession and host-side tool execution; executor preview replies send System::new host metadata and tool previews, and unknown-tool failures send ExecutionStatus failure events.

childModules.name: tool
childModules.purpose: Top-level marix-tool crate that defines ToolProgram and native tool executables; it now depends on marix-protocol for tool preview/schema protocol types.
